value.name: xWFData

value.description: Additional documents that were added in the intake form

value.description: body of the email notification to be sent when error occures

value.name: vReferenceDocuments

value.name: vFromNoReply

value.description: Id of the workflow

value.name: vOriginallyStartedFrom

value.name: xSystemCommon

value.description: This will be the Contract Number

value.name: vSalesOrSpend
value.description: Var for setting attribute

value.name: sCurrentDate

value.name: dUpdateMetadataMapping
